song_name: Michael Bublé - Havent Met You Yet - High School Musical - What Ive Been Looking For
version_description: Mashup of two songs that think sound similar :).
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]

[ch]C[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch]    [ch]Dm7[/ch]    [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]    x2


[Verse 1]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]          [ch]F[/ch]
I'm Not Surprised[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]Dm7[/ch]
Not Everything Lasts[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]Am[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]
I've Broken My Heart So Many Times,[/tab]

I Stop Keeping Track.
[tab][ch]C[/ch]           [ch]F[/ch]
Talk Myself In[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Dm7[/ch]
I Talk Myself Out[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]Am[/ch]
I Get All Worked Up[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]G[/ch]
And Then I Let Myself Down.[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]

[tab][ch]Dm7[/ch]                [ch]Em[/ch]
I Tried So Very Hard Not To Loose It[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm7[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]
I Came Up With A Million Excuses[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm7[/ch]            [ch]Em[/ch]                       [ch]F[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]
I Thought I Thought Of Every Possibility[/tab]


[WHAT IVE BEEN LOOKING FOR]

[VERSE]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]                [ch]F[/ch]                   [ch]Dm7[/ch]
It's hard to believe that I couldn't see[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]G[/ch]
That you were always there beside me[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                [ch]F[/ch]                 [ch]Dm7[/ch]
Thought I was alone with no one to hold[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]G[/ch]
But you were always right beside me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm7[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]
This feeling's like no other[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm7[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]
I want you to know[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]                          [ch]F[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]
I've never had someone that knows me like you do, the way you do[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]                     [ch]F[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]
I've never had someone as good for me as you, no one like you[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]             [ch]Dm7[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]
So lonely before I finally found[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
What I've been looking for[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]          [ch]C/E[/ch]         [ch]Dm7[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]A#[/ch]
So good to be seen, so good to be heard[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]G[/ch]
Don't have to say a word[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]        [ch]C/E[/ch]       [ch]Dm[/ch] 7     [ch]C[/ch]         [ch]A#[/ch]
For so long I was lost, so good to be found[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]
I'm loving having you around[/tab]


[HAVNT MET YOU YET]

[Outro]

[tab]    [ch]Am[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]
I Just Haven't Met You Yet[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]F[/ch]             [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]Dm[/ch]
Oh Promise You Kid[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Am[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch]
To Give So Much More Than I Get[/tab]


[tab]        [ch]C[/ch]         [ch]F[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch] [ch]Dm[/ch]
I Said Love Love Love Love Love Love Love .....[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Am[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]
I Just Haven't Met You Yet[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]         [ch]F[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch] [ch]Dm[/ch]
Love Love Love .....[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Am[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]
I Just Haven't Met You Yet[/tab]
